name: pr-review
description: Coordinates pull request reviews through explicit Paperclip review issues. Reviewers may mirror verdicts as PR comments, but GitHub-native approvals require distinct non-author GitHub credentials.

issues.title: Set up Paperclip PR review workflow
issues.description: Document and verify the PR workflow: feature branches, PR links, explicit Paperclip review child issues for Code Reviewer and Product Owner, and engineer-owned merges after review issues are resolved. Optional branch protection may disable direct pushes or require CI, but do not require GitHub-native approving reviews unless the project has distinct non-author GitHub reviewer credentials.
